name: Own The Hour.
tagline: AI Organization Manager for solo operators.

voice.personality: speaks to the solo operator who runs human and AI teams from one dashboard — pragmatic, not aspirational
do: Lead with operational outcomes, not features
Reference AI teams, agents, delegation, and execution
Speak to the operator mindset — they want leverage, not theory
dont: Never sound like a generic SaaS ad
Don't use personal growth language — this is operations, not inspiration
sample_phrases: One dashboard. Human + AI. Fully managed.
Your team doesn't clock out. Own The Hour does.
You delegate once. It runs until you say stop.

aida.attention_hook: a friction point solo operators face managing human + AI teams
aida.interest: what a unified AI organization dashboard actually enables
aida.desire: running your entire operation from one screen without dropping anything
aida.action: visit ownthehour.app / book a demo / get early access
